example: The woodcutter chopped down trees to gather firewood.
Their cottage stood at the edge of the forest.
Firewood was scarce during the long winter nights.
The youngest daughter was the gentlest of all the children.
She helped her mother without complaint.
There came a knock at the door on a cold winter night.
The bear was enormous, its fur pale as moonlit snow.
The bear said, 'I know your hardship.'
The woodcutter staggered back in fear and disbelief.
He reacted with disbelief to the bear's offer.
The bear vanished into the snowy dark.
Hunger did not loosen its grip on the family.
The bear repeated its offer to the family.
There was only necessity and sorrow in the decision.
The girl waited until her companion slept.
The prince said, 'You have betrayed me.'
The prince was enchanted by a troll hag.
ja: 魔法をかけられた、魅了された

example: The prince was under a spell that turned him into a bear by day.
The girl found herself alone in a barren wilderness.
ja: 荒野、自然のままの土地

example: She received three magical gifts from old women.
The east wind was fierce and ancient.
The girl reached a dark castle where trolls gathered.
The trolls demanded a test to decide the bride.
The spell shattered and the castle collapsed.
The prince and the girl returned home wealthy.
